session_note: S66 P1 (Micro): CI GitHub Actions node20->node24 major bump. deploy.yml (checkout v4->v6, setup-node v4->v6, upload-pages-artifact v3->v5, deploy-pages v4->v5) + e2e.yml (checkout v4->v6, setup-node v4->v6, upload-artifact v4->v7). A.0 de-risked: no packageManager field (setup-node v5+ auto-cache wont trigger; explicit cache:npm stays), no .nojekyll / no public dotfiles (upload-pages-artifact v4+ dotfile-exclusion drops nothing). Staged verify: PR (e2e on pull_request, zero prod) -> merge (deploy + curl live site, reversible). User approved! work thoroughly. CHECK = RALPH + GROK-ANALYST + Rule22 runtime YAML audit.
council_waiver_reason: Micro tier, user-path explicit approval ("approved! work it thoroughly") auto-waives deliberation per CLAUDE.md.
triumvirate_check: S65 P3 (CI flake-harden, Micro) verified. Quarantined the 4-peer real-WebRTC nplayer test to a non-gating CI lane so gating-CI-red == real regression. A.0: playwright.config retries=2-in-CI already exists (insufficient); deterministic transport REJECTED by prior Council (config C9); e2e.yml already deploy-independent. FIX: e2e.yml Run-E2E split into (1) GATING playwright test --grep-invert @quarantine-flaky (24 tests; reds the job on a real regression) + (2) NON-GATING continue-on-error+if:always --grep @quarantine-flaky --output=test-results-quarantine --reporter=list (the 1 tagged test; runs+visible but cannot red the gate; separate output dir + list reporter so it never overwrites the gating report/traces). The 4-peer test carries an explicit @quarantine-flaky tag in nplayer.spec.ts (fail-safe: new tests gate by default). EMPIRICAL (exact CI commands): --grep-invert --list=24, --grep --list=1, gating lane real run 23 passed/1 skipped, quarantine lane real run 1 passed (34.8s), YAML parses (both steps structured). CHECK = RALPH:PATROL PASS (scope=e2e.yml + nplayer tag) + GROK-ANALYST r1 FAIL->FIXED (finding-1 report-collision -> --output + --reporter=list; finding-3 fail-unsafe semantic grep -> explicit @quarantine-flaky tag) + r2 PASS (5 attacks held; fixes resolve findings, no new issue) + Rule22 runtime audit clean (--grep/--grep-invert/--output/--reporter all real flags verified RUNNING; no unrendered vars/non-existent refs; runtime-verified not just parsed). ACCEPTED+logged (finding-2): two sequential webServer :5173 boots can rarely race but only the non-gating lane is affected. VERDICT SHIP. checkpoint cb0393c.

priorities.label: S66 P1 (Micro) CI GitHub Actions node20->node24 major bump. SCOPE (2 files, 7 version-string edits, no logic change, floating-major pins per existing convention): deploy.yml checkout@v4->@v6 + setup-node@v4->@v6 + upload-pages-artifact@v3->@v5 + deploy-pages@v4->@v5; e2e.yml checkout@v4->@v6 + setup-node@v4->@v6 + upload-artifact@v4->@v7. A.0: latest majors via gh release list (authoritative); breaking-change review vs OUR usage all clear (bare checkout/deploy-pages; upload-artifact single named upload past the v3->v4 break; pages pair v5+v5 matched). Local de-risk clean: no packageManager field, no .nojekyll/public dotfiles. NOT touched: node-version 22 (build runtime, not action-runner node), S65 P3 quarantine split, path filters, permissions, concurrency. TESTING (boot-then-smoke, staged+reversible since deploy.yml = prod): Stage1 branch+PR -> e2e on pull_request (no deploy) green; Stage2 merge to master -> deploy+e2e on push green + curl spark-online.space serves; revert+redeploy if off. CHECK RALPH:PATROL + GROK-ANALYST + Rule22 runtime audit on YAML diff.
priorities.check_method: S66 P1 (CI Actions node20->node24 bump, Micro) verified. Bumped all 5 Actions off deprecated node20 to node24-native majors: deploy.yml checkout@v4->v6, setup-node@v4->v6, upload-pages-artifact@v3->v5, deploy-pages@v4->v5; e2e.yml checkout@v4->v6, setup-node@v4->v6, upload-artifact@v4->v7. A.0 (gh release list authoritative + per-major changelog read): all breaking changes reviewed vs OUR usage and cleared - bare checkout/deploy-pages unaffected; single named upload past the v3->v4 immutability break; pages pair v5+v5 matched; no packageManager field (setup-node v5+ auto-cache inert); no shipped dotfiles (dist/ empirically 0 dotfiles). The handoff UNDER-counted: it named 3 actions and missed the upload-pages-artifact/deploy-pages coupled pair entirely. CHECK = RALPH:PATROL PASS (scope=2 YAML, grep-confirmed no stray pins, peaceiris@v3 comment intentionally kept) + GROK-ANALYST (grok-4.20-0309-reasoning) FIX-THEN-SHIP (confirmed 4/5 usage-claims; flagged upload-pages-artifact v4+ hidden-file exclusion -> added include-hidden-files:true, behavior-preserving, .git/.github excluded regardless; SHA-pin suggestion logged as optional future hardening per Rule16, out of node24-bump scope) + Rule22 runtime audit CLEAN (no new ${} placeholders, no hallucinated flags, all 5 majors verified via gh release list, include-hidden-files verified in upload-pages-artifact@v5 action.yml). RUNTIME-VERIFIED end-to-end (boot-then-smoke, not just static parse): Stage1 e2e PR run SUCCESS (checkout@v6 + setup-node@v6 + gating 23 passed/1 skipped + upload-artifact@v7 all green; 4-peer quarantine flaked exit1 but continue-on-error kept job green, re-proving the S65 mechanism on node24); Stage2 FF-merge to master -> deploy run SUCCESS (build: checkout@v6+setup-node@v6+vite/tsc build+upload-pages-artifact@v5 with include-hidden-files; deploy: deploy-pages@v5) + LIVE SITE curl HTTP 200 OK, Last-Modified 12:27 fresh (matches deploy), <title>SPARK</title>, serving /assets/index-BQNJ5y21.js (EXACT local-build hash -> CI built identical artifact), custom-domain/CNAME intact. Build 509.37KB (<550 charter). VERDICT SHIP. checkpoint b643c42.

reflexion_entries_to_archive: P1 #ci-node24-bump #grok-caught-hidden-file-default #boot-then-smoke-prod-deploy #a0-gh-release-authoritative: bumped all 5 GitHub Actions off deprecated node20 to node24-native majors (checkout v4->v6, setup-node v4->v6, upload-artifact v4->v7, upload-pages-artifact v3->v5, deploy-pages v4->v5) across deploy.yml + e2e.yml. KEY (Grok earned its keep again, cf S65 x2): A.0 via `gh release list` was authoritative over the stale handoff - the handoff named only 3 actions, UNDER-counted by missing the upload-pages-artifact/deploy-pages coupled pair, and understated the major-version gaps (it implied a simple v4->v5, reality was up to v4->v7). Per-major changelog review cleared every breaking change vs our usage. GROK-ANALYST FIX-THEN-SHIP: confirmed 4/5 claims but flagged upload-pages-artifact v4+ SILENTLY excludes hidden files by default (v3 included them) -> added include-hidden-files:true (behavior-preserving). PRIME-AUDIT of Grok (don't rubber-stamp the reviewer): its 'Pages-via-Actions runs Jekyll' claim was WRONG (conflates the legacy branch-based path with the Actions artifact path), and dist/ empirically has 0 dotfiles (NOT a live regression) - but the fix is still correct as behavior-preservation + future-proofing; its SHA-pin suggestion was a real but OUT-OF-SCOPE policy change (Rule16) -> logged as optional future hardening, not silently adopted. LESSONS: (a) A.0 empirical version-probe (gh release list) beats handoff claims - the handoff was both incomplete AND understated. (b) for a version BUMP, neutralize the action's CHANGED DEFAULTS (include-hidden-files) to stay behavior-preserving; don't just swap the number. (c) staged-verify a prod-touching CI change: a PR exercises the pull_request lane with ZERO prod impact, then merge runs deploy + curl-smoke the LIVE site (200 + fresh Last-Modified + exact asset hash) - static YAML parse != live deploy. (d) the [DELIBERATION GATE] 'ptrue' advisory is a COSMETIC non-numeric-id artifact (hooks expect numeric ids per json_helpers.sh:376); the real blocking gate (pdca-final-gate.sh) keys on deliberation_completed+unlock_source which were set - confirmed by edits succeeding. EMPIRICAL: e2e PR SUCCESS (23/1 gating + upload@v7), deploy SUCCESS, live site HTTP 200 serving index-BQNJ5y21.js, build 509.37KB. checkpoint b643c42.
